text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One day off, I decide to have lunch off<n>campus
for a change of pace, and find<n>myself unable to
decipher a menu<n>written in a foreign language.
choice_data_list: (I can't make head nor tail of this...)

text_block_list.text: Hah, looks like you don't know a lick<n>of French.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I turn to toward the voice coming from<n>the next
table next over.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
You can't read the menu, can you?<n>Need some
help?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Sure. I'll only tell you what it says,<n>though. It's
still up to you to figure out<n>what's good.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Her words are strangely loaded.<n>Should I
swallow my pride and ask for<n>help?
choice_data_list: I'll try to do it myself.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Suit yourself. Hope that works out for<n>you.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Then, after I manage to order...

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
What's this? Nothin' but veggies?<n>That's some
luck you got there.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Come on, cheer up. Meals are<n>supposed to be
happy occasions.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
I suppose I better lend you a hand.<n>Here, pass
your plate over.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: All finished. It wasn't bad, but...

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
A meal of only veggies really leaves<n>something
to be desired. It's not<n>filling. You know what I'm
saying,<n>right?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Take me right now, for example. I'm<n>still
famished, and here in front of me,<n>there's a...
soft... juicy...

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Pfft, haha, hahaha! Relax, I'm not<n>gonna gobble
you up or anything.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: ...Not this time, at least.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Good on you for being honest. Now,<n>let's start
with some appetizers...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Sirius Symboli explains the menu<n>items and
places the order for me.<n>Shortly after...

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
An appetizer, soup, and a main to top<n>it off. Not
bad, eh?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: You're thanking me?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Come on, now. It's a bit early for that,<n>don't you
think?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I ponder what she means until the<n>food is
delivered... and she moves it all<n>to her own table.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Hate to break it to you, but I was just<n>giving you
an example. In other words,<n>I was ordering for
myself.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Haha, don't look at me like that!<n>You'll only
make me want to tease<n>you more.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Now try and order on your own. Show<n>me
whether or not you've learned<n>anything.
